project_scope: lattice-based anonymous authentication backend; not a general-purpose anonymous credential system

paper_safe_claim: v2.3 splices the selected refresh-tag SHA-256 digest output bits into the generated LaZer proof path using rows 6 and 7, while SHA-256 compression/preimage checking remains in the fullrelation checker/IR path. It is the first native-splice prototype, not a complete native SHA-256 LaZer proof.
